context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the phoenix-liveview-auth instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill before writing ANY `on_mount` hook or LiveView auth code.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Always use `on_mount` callbacks for LiveView auth** — never check auth in `mount/3` directly

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `mount_current_scope/2` to extract scope from session** — never access session tokens manually

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **`:halt` must redirect with a flash message** — never silently drop the connection

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define `on_mount` hooks once, reference via `live_session` in router** — never duplicate auth logic across LiveView modules

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define `on_mount` hooks** in `UserAuth` with import conflict resolution; verify the module compiles cleanly with `mix compile`

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run auth tests** with `mix test test/my_app_web/live/` and assert redirect tuples match expected paths; if tests fail, check session config and verify `Accounts.get_user_by_session_token/1` returns the correct user
